hero.heading: Gapflow and Vertex AI
hero.subheading: Enterprise AI platform for building and deploying ML models at scale

documentation.title: Getting Started with Vertex AI
documentation.description: Connect Google Vertex AI to Gapflow and deploy enterprise-grade machine learning models.

documentation.title: AutoML & Custom Training
documentation.description: Train models with AutoML or custom code for any machine learning task at scale.

documentation.title: Model Deployment & Serving
documentation.description: Deploy models to production endpoints with auto-scaling and monitoring.

tutorials.title: End-to-End ML Pipeline
tutorials.description: Build a complete MLOps pipeline from data ingestion to model serving with full automation.

tutorials.title: AutoML Image Classification
tutorials.description: Train and deploy a custom image classification model using AutoML without writing code.

tutorials.title: Real-time Predictions at Scale
tutorials.description: Set up real-time prediction endpoints that scale automatically based on traffic.

faqs.question: How do I connect Vertex AI?
faqs.answer: Use Google Cloud service account credentials with appropriate Vertex AI permissions for secure access.

faqs.question: What is AutoML?
faqs.answer: AutoML automatically builds and trains models without code. Supports vision, NLP, tabular, video use cases.

faqs.question: Can I use custom models?
faqs.answer: Yes! Train custom models with TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn. Full flexibility for any ML framework.

faqs.question: How does scaling work?
faqs.answer: Automatic scaling based on traffic. Configure min/max replicas for optimal cost and performance.

faqs.question: What about model monitoring?
faqs.answer: Built-in monitoring for drift detection, performance tracking, and explainability. Alerts for degradation.

faqs.question: Can I do batch predictions?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Batch prediction jobs for large datasets with automatic parallelization and optimization.

testimonials.quote: Vertex AI MLOps capabilities are unmatched. Train, deploy, monitor - entire lifecycle automated.
testimonials.author: Dr. Sarah Johnson

testimonials.quote: AutoML saved us 6 months of development. Production-ready models with just our data.
testimonials.author: Michael Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: Model serving scales perfectly. Handle 100 to 100K requests per second seamlessly.
testimonials.author: Jennifer Chen

testimonials.quote: Feature Store integration simplified our pipelines. Consistent features across training and serving.
testimonials.author: David Kim

limits.title: API Quotas
limits.description: Quotas vary by operation and region. Request quota increases for high-volume production use.

limits.title: Training Resources
limits.description: Training job resources configurable. Larger models require more compute and time.

limits.title: Endpoint Scaling
limits.description: Auto-scaling has limits. Configure appropriately for traffic patterns and set max replicas.

limits.title: Data Transfer
limits.description: Best performance when data in same region. Cross-region transfers incur costs and latency.
